texto: I make no secret of the fact that writing She-Hulk can serve as an opportunity for me to sneak in some really cool characters that I personally love. Some will be obvious fits, but others will come out of left field - but that's what's fun about the Marvel U - the bench is deep.
explicacao: Citação de Charles Soule sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I make no secret of the fact that writing She-Hulk can serve as an opportunity for me to sneak in…” articula amor, love, deep em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como deep e opportunity.

frase_original: I make no secret of the fact that writing She-Hulk can serve as an opportunity for me to sneak in some really cool characters that I personally love. Some will be obvious fits, but others will come out of left field - but that's what's fun about the Marvel U - the bench is deep.

texto: 'Thunderbolts' I was mostly attracted to because I really wanted to write Punisher and Elektra and Deadpool, who are characters I have always really enjoyed. But the funny thing is that over time, I came to really like Red Leader; he became one of my favorite guys in the book. Sometimes characters surprise you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Charles Soule: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “'Thunderbolts' I was mostly attracted to because I really wanted to write Punisher and Elektra an…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, time, leader pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de leader e red.

frase_original: 'Thunderbolts' I was mostly attracted to because I really wanted to write Punisher and Elektra and Deadpool, who are characters I have always really enjoyed. But the funny thing is that over time, I came to really like Red Leader; he became one of my favorite guys in the book. Sometimes characters surprise you.
